generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleMQTT
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedMQTT
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls cart movement via TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls hoist movement via TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Picks up containers for crane operations"
]

instance SwingAngleMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance CraneStateMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance SwingAngleTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle time-series data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed time-series data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CraneStateTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state time-series data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for operational data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ValidationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for monitoring crane system metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for system deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, ValidationService, SimulationService, FaultLocalizationService, SystemModelingService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for system control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance ArduinoIDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development environment for Arduino-based hardware control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for physical system design"
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemModelingService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlanningInsight
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous data logging to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLogInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based visualization of crane system metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation against simulation thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Crane dynamics simulation for trajectory testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance FaultLocalizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault localization via time series classification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight
]

instance SystemModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering using Capella"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemModelingInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Actuator control for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuatorControlAction
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault localization via time series classification"
]

instance ValidationAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous validation alerts prompting operator action"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based trajectory planning insights"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Crane dynamics simulation insights for trajectory testing"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane system metrics"
]

instance DataLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous logging of operational data to database"
]

instance SystemModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling via Capella"
]

instance ActuatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control signals for cart, hoist, and electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GantryCraneDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin environment for lab-scale gantry crane system"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, TimescaleDB, Grafana, EclipseMosquitto, Docker, PythonGantrylib, ArduinoIDE, AutodeskFusion360, Capella, TrajectoryGenerationService, DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, ValidationService, SimulationService, FaultLocalizationService, SystemModelingService, ControlService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by Trajectory Generator Service sent via MQTT to Control Application, which interfaces with physical crane's motor controllers for movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with no specified time intervals; data logging and validation occur continuously during operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where physical crane components interact with digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) via MQTT and database; physical interface connects to crane controllers."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (CAD models) and 'as operated' (real-time operational data) phases of the physical crane's lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares measured trajectories with simulated ones using distance metrics against thresholds; simulation provides confidence bounds (e.g., blue/yellow in Grafana) for validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for digital service communication; Python-based physical interface communicates with Arduino controller for crane motor and sensor control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker containers for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard; gantrylib Python module installed via pip."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Ad-hoc implementation using general-purpose open-source tools without adherence to specific digital twin standards."
]
